history.en: The the golden eyes and the shiny black coa of the Bopmbay is absolutely striking. Likely to bond most with one family member, the Bombay will follow you from room to room and will almost always have something to say about what you are doing, loving attention and to be carried around, often on his caregiver's shoulder.
history.zh: 孟买猫的金色眼睛和闪亮黑色被毛绝对引人注目。它们很可能与家庭中的某个成员建立最深的联系，会跟随你从一个房间到另一个房间，并且几乎总是对你正在做的事情发表意见，喜欢被关注和被抱着，通常是在主人的肩膀上。

overview.en: The Bombay cat is a strikingly beautiful breed known for its sleek, jet-black coat and luminous golden eyes. Bred to resemble a miniature black panther, the Bombay combines the muscular build of the Burmese with the glossy coat of the American Shorthair. Affectionate, gentle, and highly intelligent, this breed forms deep bonds with its family, often singling out one person as its primary caregiver. Bombays are famously dependent and crave constant companionship; they will follow you from room to room, chat about your activities, and love being held or carried on your shoulder. Despite their wild appearance, they are playful and sociable, thriving on interactive games and human interaction. Their personality is a perfect blend of curiosity and loyalty, making them an ideal lap cat for those who want a devoted, talkative, and loving companion.
overview.zh: 孟买猫是一种极具魅力的猫种，以光滑乌黑的被毛和闪亮的金色眼睛著称。它被培育成类似迷你黑豹的样子，结合了缅甸猫的肌肉感和美国短毛猫的光泽被毛。孟买猫感情丰富、性格温和且非常聪明，能与家人建立深厚的情感纽带，常会特别依赖一位主要照顾者。它们以依赖性强而闻名，渴望持续陪伴，会跟着你从一个房间走到另一个房间，对你所做的事发表意见，并喜欢被抱着或趴在主人肩上。尽管外表野性，它们却活泼好动、善于社交，热衷于互动游戏和人类接触。其性格是好奇心与忠诚的完美结合，是那些想要一只忠诚、爱说话又充满爱意的陪伴猫的理想选择。

care.en: Daily care for a Bombay cat is straightforward but requires consistency. Their short, fine coat needs only weekly brushing with a soft bristle brush or rubber grooming mitt to remove loose hair and maintain a healthy shine. Bathing is rarely needed unless the cat gets dirty. Because Bombays are active and playful, provide at least 15–20 minutes of interactive play daily using wand toys, laser pointers, or puzzle feeders to satisfy their intelligence and energy. Regular nail trimming (every two weeks) and ear cleaning (weekly) are essential. Annual veterinary check-ups are recommended, with vaccinations and dental care as advised by your vet. Spaying or neutering is important for health and behavior. Their dependent nature means they dislike being left alone for long periods; consider a pet sitter or companion cat if you work long hours.
care.zh: 孟买猫的日常护理简单但需要坚持。它们短而细腻的被毛只需每周用软毛刷或橡胶梳梳理一次，以去除浮毛并保持光泽。除非猫咪弄脏，否则很少需要洗澡。由于孟买猫活泼好动，每天应提供至少15到20分钟的互动游戏，如逗猫棒、激光笔或益智喂食器，以满足其智力和精力需求。定期修剪指甲（每两周一次）和清洁耳朵（每周一次）必不可少。建议每年进行一次兽医体检，并按兽医建议进行疫苗接种和牙齿护理。绝育对健康和行为管理很重要。孟买猫依赖性强的性格意味着它们不喜欢长时间独处；如果你工作时间较长，可以考虑请宠物保姆或再养一只猫作伴。

training.en: Bombay cats are exceptionally intelligent and eager to please, making training a rewarding experience. Use positive reinforcement techniques such as treats, praise, and clicker training. They quickly learn tricks like sit, high-five, or fetch, and can even be trained to walk on a harness. Start training sessions when the cat is young, keeping them short (5–10 minutes) and fun. Consistency is key; use the same cues and rewards each time. Bombays respond poorly to punishment or harsh tones, which can damage trust. Because they are talkative, you can also shape their vocalizations by rewarding quiet meows or specific sounds. Litter box training is usually instinctive, but ensure the box is clean and placed in a quiet area. For behavioral issues like scratching, provide a sturdy scratching post and redirect unwanted behavior gently.
training.zh: 孟买猫非常聪明且乐于取悦主人，因此训练是一种愉快的体验。使用正面强化方法，如零食、表扬和响片训练。它们能快速学会坐下、击掌或衔回等技巧，甚至能训练适应胸背带散步。训练应在猫咪幼年时开始，每次保持短暂（5到10分钟）且有趣。一致性至关重要，每次使用相同的指令和奖励。孟买猫对惩罚或严厉语气反应不佳，这会破坏信任。由于它们爱叫，你可以通过奖励安静的叫声或特定声音来塑造其发声习惯。猫砂盆训练通常是本能的，但需保持猫砂盆清洁并放置在安静区域。对于抓挠等行为问题，提供坚固的猫抓板并温和地引导不良行为。

diet.en: A Bombay cat's diet should be high-quality, protein-rich, and balanced to support its muscular build and energy levels. Choose a premium commercial cat food (wet or dry) that lists meat as the first ingredient, such as chicken, turkey, or fish. Avoid fillers like corn, wheat, and soy. Because Bombays are prone to obesity if overfed, measure portions according to the manufacturer's guidelines and your vet's advice, typically 1/3 to 1/2 cup of dry food per day split into two meals, or equivalent wet food. Fresh, clean water must always be available. Treats should be limited to no more than 10% of daily calories. Some Bombays may have sensitive stomachs, so introduce new foods gradually over a week. Consider incorporating omega-3 fatty acids (from fish oil) for coat health, and consult your vet about supplements. Avoid feeding bones, raw eggs, or toxic foods like onions and chocolate.
diet.zh: 孟买猫的饮食应高品质、富含蛋白质且营养均衡，以支持其肌肉结构和能量水平。选择以肉类（如鸡肉、火鸡或鱼）为首要成分的优质商业猫粮（湿粮或干粮），避免含玉米、小麦和大豆等填充物。由于孟买猫容易因过量进食而肥胖，需根据制造商指南和兽医建议测量分量，通常每天分两餐喂食1/3到1/2杯干粮或等量湿粮。必须随时提供新鲜干净的饮用水。零食热量不应超过每日总热量的10%。部分孟买猫肠胃敏感，新食物应在一周内逐步引入。可考虑添加富含欧米伽-3脂肪酸的鱼油以维护被毛健康，并咨询兽医关于补充剂的建议。避免喂食骨头、生鸡蛋或洋葱、巧克力等有毒食物。

livingTips.en: The Bombay cat adapts well to apartment living as long as it has enough vertical space and stimulation. Provide cat trees, shelves, and window perches so they can climb and observe. They are not aloof and dislike being left alone for long periods, making them best suited for owners who work from home or have a companion pet. Bombays are gentle with children and get along well with other cats and even cat-friendly dogs, especially if introduced gradually. Their playful nature means they enjoy interactive toys and puzzle games. A secure, enclosed balcony or catio can offer safe outdoor enrichment. Because they bond deeply with one person, ensure that person is available for daily cuddles and play. Avoid homes where they would be isolated or ignored. Overall, the Bombay thrives in a loving, attentive environment where they are treated as a true family member.
livingTips.zh: 孟买猫只要拥有足够的垂直空间和刺激，就能很好地适应公寓生活。提供猫爬架、搁架和窗台，让它们可以攀爬和观察。它们不冷漠，不喜欢长时间独处，因此最适合在家工作或有其他宠物陪伴的主人。孟买猫对孩子温和，能与其他猫甚至友善的狗和睦相处，尤其是经过逐步介绍后。它们爱玩的天性意味着喜欢互动玩具和益智游戏。一个安全封闭的阳台或猫笼可以提供安全的户外活动。由于它们与某一人建立深厚情感，确保那个人每天能给予拥抱和玩耍。避免让它们生活在被孤立或忽视的家庭中。总的来说，孟买猫在充满爱心、关注度高的环境中茁壮成长，被视为真正的家庭成员。
